name: Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the beaten eggs, dark corn syrup, sugar, vanilla extract, and cinnamon.
2. Stir in the pecans until evenly coated.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared 9-inch pie crust.
4. Place the pie on a baking sheet to catch any spills.
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour, or until the filling is set.
6. Turn off the oven and allow the pie to cool inside with the heat on for at least 30 minutes before serving.
